title: A Very Special Function for LTID Systems: The Everlasting Exponential z^n
summary: This page derives the unit step response g[n] as the cumulative sum of the impulse response h[n], along with the inverse relation h[n] = g[n] - g[n-1]. It then introduces the everlasting exponential z^n as an eigenfunction of LTID systems and defines the transfer function H[z] through the response y[n] = H[z]z^n and the series H[z] = Σ h[m]z^{-m}.
